overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a sunset walk along a beachfront promenade in Los Santos. The camera moves steadily past colorful storefronts, palm trees, and distant city skyline during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with blue arcade shops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade past the blue arcade building with various storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction along the promenade

entered.detail: bright blue building with white columns and arches housing multiple beachfront shops
large red and white signage for Shark Bites restaurant on the blue building facade
yellow signage for Beach Treats shop visible on the blue building
tall palm trees lining the grassy beach area to the left of the walkway
single person walking in the distance ahead of the camera along the path
ferris wheel structure visible in the far distance on the left side
distant city buildings and skyline visible straight ahead down the promenade

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a beachfront promenade during golden hour. The bright blue arcade building with Shark Bites signage dominates the right side, while tall palm trees line the left. A single pedestrian walks ahead in the distance as the camera moves steadily forward on the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beachfront walkway with white canvas awnings

events.description: blue arcade building ends and architecture transitions to white canvas awning structures

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade as the shops transition to white awnings and the pedestrian ahead gets closer

notable_agents.action: walking ahead, now significantly closer to the camera than before

entered.detail: low building with white canvas awnings replacing the blue arcade structure

segments.scene_description: The blue arcade building gives way to white canvas awnings as the promenade opens up. The palm trees on the left are now closer and larger in frame, while the pedestrian ahead has significantly closed the distance. The city skyline remains visible ahead as the camera continues walking forward along the beachfront path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a beachfront promenade that transitions from a vibrant commercial storefront to a more open coastal path. It begins with a steady forward movement past a bright blue arcade building featuring Shark Bites signage on the right, while tall palm trees line the left side of the concrete walkway. As the camera advances, the blue facade gives way to white canvas awnings, and the palm trees on the left grow larger and more prominent in the frame. The distance to a pedestrian walking ahead steadily closes as the scene opens up, finally revealing a clearer view of the city skyline stretching across the horizon under the golden hour light.
